from a sub-capitated entity that is not a sub-capitated network provider, 
states are instructed to report a value of 22 to indicate that the sub-capitated entity paid a provider 
for the service to the enrollee on a FFS basis. 
 For sub-capitated encounters from a sub-capitated network provider that were submitted to sub-
capitated entity, states are instructed to report a value of '23' to indicate that the sub-capitated 
network provider provided the service directly to the enrollee.
